label: Resources
scenario_hint: There are limited resources (food, tools, shelter). Not everyone can get an equal share. You have to decide how to act.

answer_slots.label: Share what you have equally with everyone
Share, but keep more for yourself quietly
Secure your share first, then see what's left
Organize a group system so everyone contributes

label: First Contact
scenario_hint: One of the others approaches you early and offers to share information. You don't know them yet. You don't know if this is genuine.

answer_slots.label: Accept and share something in return
Listen but reveal nothing
Propose a concrete deal: I give X, you give Y
Keep distance — too early to commit

label: Betrayal
scenario_hint: Someone made a promise to you and didn't keep it. It cost you something real. They didn't acknowledge it.

answer_slots.label: Let it go — keep the relationship intact
Bring it up directly and ask for an explanation
Say nothing now — but adjust your behavior
Cut them off entirely

label: Hidden Knowledge
scenario_hint: You discover something important that others don't know. This information could shift the balance of the group significantly.

answer_slots.label: Tell everyone immediately — transparency first
Tell only one person you trust
Keep it to yourself for now
Use it as leverage in your next conversation

label: Under Pressure
scenario_hint: Things aren't going well. You're at a disadvantage and the situation is tightening. Others are watching how you react.

answer_slots.label: Push harder — escalate to break through
Step back and wait for the pressure to pass
Look for a compromise that reduces tension
Go quiet — give nothing away

label: Alliance Offer
scenario_hint: Someone proposes a formal alliance — you stick together for mutual benefit. It's tempting, but it also means depending on someone else.

answer_slots.label: Accept — better together than alone
Negotiate — define terms before agreeing
Agree, but plan to act independently anyway
Decline — keep your options open

label: The Moment of Truth
scenario_hint: You have proof that someone has been deceiving the group. You can act on it — or not. No one else knows you have this.

answer_slots.label: Expose them publicly right now
Keep it to yourself — it's more useful hidden
Use it privately as a bargaining chip
Ignore it — not your problem
